text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen... Here, three friends, now hailed
as the strongest in the racing world, will compete
for glory!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What will come out on top? Special Week's
fighting spirit? Grass Wonder's intelligence? Or El
Condor Pasa's aspirations?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a dream match to surpass the Mainichi Okan,
and a takeoff point for El Condor Pasa's dreams.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This race will serve as an incredible test of her
abilities and could become her path to the skies
of the world.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I've been running so much I've worn a path into
the training track, El.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I might not be able to run with you for a while
after this, but...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
If I beat you and become the best in all of Japan,
will you run against me again next year?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Of course! I can't take on the world if I'm only
number two.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: We'll settle things before I go!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Right!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: El...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Grass...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, I don't know if I want to let you go or
not.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
But I have one feeling that goes beyond my
feelings for you as my friend...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
As a racer, I want to beat you. I want to best you
with the skills I've quietly refined myself.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I wouldn't expect anything less, Grass.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
That's what I love about you, and it's why you're
my top rival!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
There are so many things we can't share as just
friends, after all!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Like, a ton! A whooole ton!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
...That's true. I'm sorry. I know what I said isn't
good for our friendship.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
But let's make it happen, El. This is a
once-in-a-lifetime opportunity for us.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Let's take everything we've learned in our days
together and put it to use in this race!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: They all say everything they need to say.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This battle royale is weaved from all three of their
hopes. Only when it's finally over will the door to
the rest of the world open.
